flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Fayetteville Technical Community College fell 45% between 2006 and 2009 (12.9% → 7.1%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fayetteville Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Fayetteville Technical Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (8.3k → 9.5k).
